title: rhodax hieronymi
side_effects: Rhodax hieronymi can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing dizziness and nausea in individuals with pre-existing stomach conditions, or causing skin irritation and allergic reactions in people with sensitive skin. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to respiratory problems, including asthma-like symptoms and shortness of breath. Additionally, the plant's alkaloids can interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and decrease their effectiveness. Long-term use of Rhodax hieronymi can also lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity if proper dosage and precautions are not followed.
